name: Griffe de Magma
description: Progéniture agile et agressive dont le corps est traversé de veines de magma liquide. Ses griffes foreuses transpercent l'acier. Fragile mais dévastateur en assaut.
prompt: Dark sci-fi fantasy, lean predatory rock creature with glowing magma veins across dark obsidian body, massive drilling claws, pupilless red eyes, aggressive stance, volcanic terrain, molten ground cracks, cinematic lighting
